name: one-time-secret-gas
description: One-Time Secret sharing via Google Apps Script + Google Sheets

scripts.deploy: npm run build && clasp push --force && clasp deploy
scripts.redeploy: npm run build && clasp push --force && bash -c 'DEPLOY_ID=$(clasp deployments 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "AKfycb[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+" | tail -1) && clasp deploy --deploymentId "$DEPLOY_ID" --description "Update"'
